item.text: {"concept":"neglecter","verdicts":[{"candidate":"A","verdict":"LOSSY","missing":"It omits neglect of responsibilities and lack of due respect, while wrongly asserting that the person does not want another to feel good.","quality":1,"reason":"The low-attention component is present, but the rendering narrows neglect to one person and adds a noncriterial, overly strong lack of goodwill."}]}
